title: Course Withdrawal
text: A student may withdraw from a course before the published deadline. The withdrawal is recorded according to university policy.

title: Academic Warning
text: An academic warning may be issued when a student's cumulative GPA falls below the required threshold.

title: Exam Absence
text: A student who misses a final examination must submit an accepted excuse through the official university procedure.

title: Course Prerequisites
text: A student must satisfy all stated prerequisites before registering for a course unless an authorized exception is granted.

title: Graduation Requirements
text: Graduation requires successful completion of the approved study plan and all university and college requirements.

title: Invalid Missing ID
text: This record is intentionally invalid for the dead-letter topic demonstration.

title: Invalid Year
text: This record is intentionally invalid because the effective year is outside the accepted range.
